violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Bag of lettuce scraps in hand sink basin.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Due for deep clean of floors in dry storage building.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket found at 200ppm Chlorine.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Refrigerator at cook line found with temp of 43F-47F.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not accurate or not easily readable. -Refrigerator thermometer is inaccurate.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
